message:
bd-s13um: wire ThreeLane/Worker hot paths to TaskTable-backed mode

Update ThreeLaneScheduler and ThreeLaneWorker to use sharded TaskTable
when available, removing RuntimeState lock from scheduling and execute
hot paths.

ThreeLaneScheduler: add with_task_table_ref helper; update
inject_cancel, inject_timed, inject_ready, spawn, wake to use task
table ref for wake_state/dedup checks.

ThreeLaneWorker: update schedule_local, schedule_local_cancel,
schedule_local_timed to use with_task_table_ref; update Poll::Pending
store_spawned_task + waker caching to use with_task_table; update
TaskExecutionGuard::Drop for panic handling; refactor
consume_cancel_ack into table-aware consume_cancel_ack_from_table;
update debug_assert steal-path checks.

Cross-cutting Poll::Ready path (task_completed,
drain_ready_async_finalizers) intentionally stays on RuntimeState
as those operations require regions and obligations tables.

Add 8 targeted tests proving TaskTable-only locking on hot paths:
inject_ready, inject_cancel, spawn, schedule_local, schedule_local_cancel,
schedule_local_timed, wake_state_dedup, consume_cancel_ack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
